reviews.review_msg: This guy is an great professor. He's enthusiastic and helpful... even at 8:30 in the morning.

I believe this was her first time teaching, and she did a phenomenal job. Clear & thorough. Compiled her own hand-made pre-class and post-class summaries into an AMAZING and incredibly comprehensive final review booklet before the final. Hard course, but she makes it as easy as possible. Couldn't recommend her more.
